name: Discovery by Dreaming: Cross-Domain Recombination in Artificial Memory
summary: arXiv:2607.16256v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Dreams splice together people, places, and times that never met. Neuroscience suggests this recombination is not noise, but a function driving insi...
description: arXiv:2607.16256v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Dreams splice together people, places, and times that never met. Neuroscience suggests this recombination is not noise, but a function driving insight and creative discovery. This reframes memory consolidation: rather than merely defending against forgetting, its measurable value lies in recombining knowledge across experiences that have not yet...
author: Oliver Zahn, James Evans, David Eagleman
